title: Decadent Smoky Middle-Eastern Avocado Grill
description: A rich and creamy avocado dish infused with the deep flavors of smoky binchotan charcoal, inspired by middle-eastern cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to 400°F (200°C) to ensure optimal binchotan charcoal smokiness.
Rinse the avocados and slice them into 1-inch thick wedges.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice, 1 tablespoon olive oil, and a pinch of salt to create a drizzle sauce.
Place the avocado wedges on the preheated raclette grill and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred and tender.
Remove the avocados from the grill and brush with the drizzle sauce.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
Repeat the cooking process for the remaining avocado wedges, adjusting the cooking time as needed.
For an added touch, sprinkle a pinch of sumac or paprika over the avocado wedges for a pop of color and flavor.
Serve the decadent smoky middle-eastern avocado grill warm, as the dish cools quickly and loses its smokiness.
To enhance the experience, pair the dish with a side of warm pita bread or a refreshing salad for a satisfying meal.
For a more indulgent treat, top the avocado wedges with crumbled feta cheese or a dollop of creamy tahini sauce.
Experiment with different types of charcoal or grill marks to create unique flavor profiles and textures.
Consider adding a squeeze of fresh lime juice or a sprinkle of chopped herbs to the avocado wedges for added brightness and freshness.
